## Screenshots or logs

Paste only non-sensitive logs. Do not include tokens, cookies, auth files, or account identifiers.

## Notes

If this is a Codex source bug, do not paste prompt text, session text, auth files, cookies, API keys, or raw credentialed monitor state.
